title: eupatorium benjamin-lincolnii var. vernicosum
intro: Eupatorium benjamin-lincolnii var. vernicosum, also known as Spotted Joe Pye Weed, is a variety of flowering plant in the Eupatorium genus, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Eupatorium benjamin-lincolnii var. vernicosum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
